categories.name: Food & drink
categories.blurb: Many work even after they dry. Treat fast for best results.

categories.name: Body fluids
categories.blurb: Always cold water first. Heat sets protein permanently.

categories.name: Cosmetics & personal care
categories.blurb: Often grease-based. Dawn is your friend.

categories.name: Office, art & craft
categories.blurb: Alcohol and acetone are the workhorses here.

categories.name: Outdoor & nature
categories.blurb: Mud, grass, sap, soot — let them dry, scrape, then treat.

categories.name: Pet stains
categories.blurb: Enzyme cleaners only — they actually digest the protein.

categories.name: Mechanical & shop
categories.blurb: Industrial-strength stains. Lestoil and Dawn earn their keep here.

categories.name: Household & mystery
categories.blurb: Rust, mildew, set yellow — needs targeted chemistry.

categories.name: Seasonal & specialty
categories.blurb: One-off stains the internet has solved so you don't have to.

stains.name: Coffee

steps.action: Blot, then flush with cold water from the back.
Soak in 1 part white vinegar to 2 parts cold water for 30 min. Launder warm.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tea

steps.action: Same as coffee — blot, cold rinse, vinegar soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Red wine

steps.action: Sprinkle baking soda or salt to absorb.
Then dab with cold water + dish soap.
Old stain: Wine-Away or hydrogen peroxide + Dawn paste.

products.name: The Laundress Wine & Coffee Stain Bar

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: White wine

steps.action: Often disappears once dried, but residual sugar yellows over time.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Beer

steps.action: Blot, cold water flush, dish soap, normal wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Champagne / sparkling wine

steps.action: Treat as white wine — cold rinse, enzyme detergent.
Sugar residue is the long-term threat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Cola / dark soda

steps.action: Sponge with 1:1 vinegar + water. Wash warm.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Fruit juice (clear)

steps.action: Cold water rinse, dish soap, normal wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Berries (blueberry, blackberry)

steps.action: Boiling water poured from height through the fabric onto a basin.
Then dish soap and cold rinse.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Strawberry / raspberry

steps.action: Cold flush, lemon juice on whites, wash with enzyme detergent.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tomato sauce / pasta sauce

steps.action: Cold water from the back. Rub with Dawn.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Ketchup

steps.action: Stubborn: a baking-soda paste before the OxiClean soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Mustard

steps.action: Treat the yellow turmeric tinge with oxygen bleach + sun.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: BBQ sauce

steps.action: Dawn for the grease layer, then OxiClean soak for the tomato/sugar layer.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Soy sauce

steps.action: Cold water flush immediately. Dish soap.
Salt can pre-blot a fresh spill.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Curry / turmeric

steps.action: Hot soak in oxygen bleach (140°F+) for 30–60 min or overnight.
Air-dry in direct sunlight — curcumin breaks down under UV.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Chocolate

steps.action: Cold rinse from the back. Dawn dish soap.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Ice cream

steps.action: Cold rinse (protein + sugar + fat — never hot).
Dawn for the fat, enzyme detergent for the protein.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Milk / baby formula

steps.action: Hot water cooks the protein into the fabric.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Butter / margarine

steps.action: Sprinkle baking soda or cornstarch to absorb the oil.
Dawn dish soap on the residue.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Cooking oil / grease splatter

steps.action: Blot, baking soda or cornstarch absorber, Dawn applied directly, wash in the warmest water the fabric tolerates.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Salad dressing (oil-based)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Salad dressing (creamy)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Mayonnaise

steps.action: Scrape, cold water, Dawn for the oil, OxiClean for any residual yellowing.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Egg yolk / scrambled egg
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Jam / jelly
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Honey

steps.action: Rinse with warm water (honey is water-soluble).

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Maple syrup

steps.action: Cold rinse, dish soap, enzyme detergent.
Sugar residue can attract more dirt if left.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Gravy / sauce drips

steps.action: Two-step like BBQ: Dawn for fat, OxiClean for the rest.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Hot sauce (oil-based)

steps.action: Dawn for the oil, oxygen bleach for the chili-pigment residue.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Vinegar / pickle juice

steps.action: If acidic discoloration, neutralize with baking soda + cold water.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tomato seeds / pulp on linen

steps.action: Scrape, cold flush, vinegar dab, enzyme wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Blood (fresh)

fabric_warnings.warning: Hydrogen peroxide / bleach is for whites only — will lift dye on colors.

steps.action: Cold water rinse immediately from the back of the fabric.
Apply hydrogen peroxide (whites) or dish soap (colors).

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Blood (dried / set)

steps.action: Soak in cold salt water 30 min.
Hydrogen peroxide for whites, enzyme pre-treater for colors. Repeat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Menstrual blood

steps.action: Same as blood — cold water, enzyme pre-treater, oxygen bleach for whites.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Sweat / yellow pit stains

steps.action: Pre-treat with Dawn or enzyme spray.
Soak in hot water + 1 scoop OxiClean for 1–6 hours. Repeat as needed.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Vomit

steps.action: Bleach-safe whites can soak in oxygen bleach.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Pet urine on fabric

steps.action: Enzyme cleaner specifically — household stain removers can't break uric acid crystals.
Soak fully, let air dry, repeat if smell returns.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Human urine (mattress, sheets)

steps.action: Cold rinse, enzyme cleaner, baking soda overnight on mattress, vacuum.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Feces

steps.action: Scrape, cold water flush, enzyme pre-treater soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Saliva / drool

steps.action: Stubborn yellow on pillowcases: OxiClean overnight soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Semen

fabric_warnings.warning: Hydrogen peroxide / bleach is for whites only — will lift dye on colors.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Breast milk / baby spit-up
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Nasal mucus

steps.action: Usually washes out without special treatment.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Lipstick (matte)

steps.action: Dawn dish soap rubbed in for 5 min.
Stubborn dye: hydrogen peroxide for whites.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Lipstick (glossy / waxy)

steps.action: Place fabric stain-down on paper towel.
Spray with hairspray or dab rubbing alcohol from the back. Then Dawn.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Foundation (liquid)

steps.action: Shaving cream rubbed in, blot, cold rinse.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Mascara

steps.action: Then enzyme detergent for any waterproof polymer residue.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Eyeliner (liquid / pencil)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Eyeshadow powder
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Nail polish (wet)

fabric_warnings.warning: Acetone dissolves acetate and modacrylic. Test first — if it melts, stop.

steps.action: Acetone or pure nail polish remover on a cotton ball from the back.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Nail polish (dried)

fabric_warnings.warning: Acetone dissolves acetate and modacrylic. Test first — if it melts, stop.

steps.action: Always test on hidden seam — acetone destroys acetate, rayon, modacrylic.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Hair dye (fresh)

steps.action: Cool rinse from the back. Dawn + cold water.
Repeat with hydrogen peroxide for whites.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Hair dye (set)

steps.action: Try hairspray (older formulas) or rubbing alcohol.
Last resort: Iron Out (color-safe oxygen) overnight.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Henna

steps.action: Cold rinse, soak in hydrogen peroxide for whites, enzyme detergent wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Fake tan / self-tanner

steps.action: Lemon juice on whites, baking soda paste, or oxygen bleach soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Sunscreen (white residue, fresh)

steps.action: Old sunscreen on whites turns yellow — pre-treat with Dawn + OxiClean soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Sunscreen yellow stains (set)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Body lotion

steps.action: Dawn dish soap for the oil base.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Perfume / cologne

fabric_warnings.warning: Silk and wool are delicate — test on a hidden seam first.

steps.action: Often a colorless yellowing on silk and pale fabrics.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Deodorant white marks (fresh)

steps.action: Rub with a dryer sheet, a piece of pantyhose, or a Hollywood Fashion Tape product. Marks lift dry.

products.name: Hollywood Fashion Tape Stain Remover Stick

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Hair gel / pomade / hair wax

steps.action: Dawn dish soap rubbed in for 10 min.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Hair mousse
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Liquid hand soap residue (yellow on towels)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Ballpoint pen ink

steps.action: Place stain face-down on paper towel.
Drip rubbing alcohol (70–91%) from the back.
Replace paper towel as ink lifts. Repeat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Permanent marker / Sharpie

steps.action: Same as ballpoint — rubbing alcohol from the back onto paper towels.
Hand sanitizer also works in a pinch.
Old cheap hairspray works on synthetics.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Highlighter

steps.action: Rubbing alcohol on the back through paper towel. Then dish soap.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Pencil graphite
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Crayon (on fabric, room temperature)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Crayon (melted in dryer onto a full load)

steps.action: Re-wash entire load with Dawn + OxiClean in hot water.
Lestoil is the cult favorite for this disaster.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Watercolor paint

steps.action: Usually comes out easily on fresh.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Acrylic paint (wet)

steps.action: Rinse immediately under cold water — acrylic is water-soluble until it dries.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Acrylic paint (dried)

fabric_warnings.warning: Acetone dissolves acetate and modacrylic. Test first — if it melts, stop.

steps.action: Scrape off, then acetone (test fabric) or rubbing alcohol from the back.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Oil paint

steps.action: Scrape, blot with turpentine or paint thinner (well-ventilated).

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Latex wall paint (wet)

steps.action: Cold water flush immediately. Dish soap. Wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: White school glue (wet)

steps.action: Soak in warm soapy water 15 min.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Super glue

fabric_warnings.warning: Acetone dissolves acetate and modacrylic. Test first — if it melts, stop.

steps.action: Apply carefully to the back of the fabric.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Glitter

steps.action: Once washed, glitter spreads through the whole load.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Slime

steps.action: Soak in white vinegar 10 min. Scrape off.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Play-Doh

steps.action: Let dry fully, then crumble off.
Cold rinse residue. Dawn + warm wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Adhesive / sticker residue

steps.action: Goo Gone or peanut butter for the adhesive.
Then Dawn + warm wash to remove the oil.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tape glue (packing/duct)

steps.action: Rubbing alcohol or Goo Gone from the back. Then Dawn.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Grass

steps.action: Enzyme pre-treater rubbed in for 10 min. OxiClean soak. Wash warm.
For whites: a few drops of hydrogen peroxide after pre-treat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Mud / dirt

steps.action: LET IT DRY FIRST. Brush off solids.
Then cold rinse + enzyme detergent. Wet mud spreads.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Clay (red / yellow)

steps.action: let dry, brush off, treat residual color with rust-style approach (lemon + salt on whites).

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tree sap / pine resin (fresh)

steps.action: Then rubbing alcohol on the back. Wash warm.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tree sap (old/polymerized)

steps.action: Try Goo Gone, mineral spirits, or turpentine. Test fabric first.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Pollen (especially lily)

steps.action: Lift loose pollen with sticky tape or shake out.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Bird droppings
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Plant chlorophyll / leaves

steps.action: enzyme pre-treater, OxiClean soak, hydrogen peroxide for whites.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Insect splatter (windshield-style)

steps.action: Some bugs leave protein stains, others leave dye.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tar / asphalt

steps.action: Apply Goo Gone or eucalyptus oil to break it down. Scrape carefully.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Soot / fireplace ash
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Smoke odor (no visible stain)

steps.action: Soak in 1 cup white vinegar + cool water 1 hour.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Concrete splash / cement
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Pet hair embedded in fabric

fabric_warnings.warning: Silk and wool are delicate — test on a hidden seam first.

steps.action: lint roller or rubber pet brush before laundering.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Cat / dog drool (yellow stain)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Cat spray (urine, intense odor)

steps.action: Enzyme cleaner only — multiple applications. Soak fully.
Avoid ammonia-based cleaners (smells like more urine to the cat, will re-mark).

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Pet vomit
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Pet feces

steps.action: Scrape, enzyme pre-treater, hot wash if fabric allows.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Cat poop on carpet

steps.action: Enzyme cleaner spray. Blot don't rub. Repeat.
Final pass with carpet shampooer if possible.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Dog mud paw prints

steps.action: Spot-clean with Folex if visible after.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Motor oil / engine grease

steps.action: Apply Dawn straight, work in 10 min.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Bike chain grease

steps.action: Dawn or Lestoil pre-treat, hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Axle grease / black grease

steps.action: Krud Kutter or Lestoil pre-treat. Hot wash. Repeat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Cooking grease splatter on apron

steps.action: Baking soda or cornstarch absorber, Dawn, hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: WD-40 / penetrating oil overspray

steps.action: Apply more dish soap. Wash hot. Repeat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Shoe polish (black)

steps.action: Apply Dawn or Lestoil, work in.
Soak in OxiClean if set. Hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Black rubber scuff (e.g. shoes on white pants)

steps.action: Magic Eraser CAREFULLY on resistant marks. Hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Tar (road tar)

steps.action: Scrape, treat from back, Dawn, hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Diesel / gasoline smell

steps.action: Soak in baking soda paste for 1 hour.
Then wash with enzyme detergent in hot water.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Rust / iron stain

fabric_warnings.warning: Caustic chemistry — wear gloves, ventilate, test on a hidden seam.

steps.action: Lemon juice + salt rubbed in, set in direct sun for 1 hour, rinse.
For tough: Whink Rust Stain Remover (test first — caustic).

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Iron scorch mark (light)
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Bleach spot (white spot on colored fabric)

steps.action: Color is gone — can't be restored.
Options: dye the garment darker, or use a fabric marker.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Mildew / mold on fabric

steps.action: Soak in 1 cup white vinegar + warm water 1 hour.
Wash hot with enzyme detergent + 1/2 cup oxygen bleach. Sun-dry.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Hard water spots (white mineral residue)

steps.action: Soak in 1 cup white vinegar + warm water.
Or use a citric-acid powder soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Yellow age stains on stored whites

steps.action: Boil if fabric allows (cotton/linen). Sun-bleach. Repeat.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: 'Ghost' stain (invisible until dry)

steps.action: Re-treat with enzyme pre-treater + OxiClean soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Brown spots from storage (cellulose rust)

steps.action: Lemon + salt + sun first. Then OxiClean.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Yellowed pit area on white t-shirts

steps.action: Pre-treat with Dawn + Whink Iron-Out, then long hot OxiClean soak. Sun-dry.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Chlorine pool damage (faded spots on swimwear)

steps.action: Rinse swimwear in cold tap water immediately after every swim to prevent.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Bug spray (DEET damage)

steps.action: DEET dissolves synthetic fabrics — can cause holes.
Wash promptly in cool water to prevent ongoing damage.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Sunscreen-iron yellowing (avobenzone + hard water)

steps.action: Whink Color-Safe Iron Out + OxiClean soak. Sun-bleach.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Candle wax (paraffin)

steps.action: Freeze, snap off, then iron through brown paper bag or paper towel to absorb residue.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Beeswax

steps.action: Same as candle wax but more stubborn.
May need a second pass with Dawn + hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Chewing gum

steps.action: Freeze (ice bag or freezer) until brittle. Scrape off.
Then dab residue with rubbing alcohol or peanut butter.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Lip balm / Chapstick (wax + oil)

steps.action: Scrape, brown paper + iron method for the wax.
Dawn for the oil. Hot wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Window cleaner overspray
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Easter egg dye

steps.action: Cold rinse, hydrogen peroxide on whites, OxiClean soak for colors.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Halloween fake blood (corn syrup + dye)

steps.action: OxiClean overnight soak for the red dye.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Glow stick fluid

steps.action: Cold rinse, hydrogen peroxide for whites, OxiClean soak.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Holi powder (gulal)

steps.action: Hard pigments may stain permanently on light fabrics.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Spray tan
stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Glitter eye makeup

steps.action: Dawn + warm rinse for the residue.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Festival mud + glitter + sunscreen combo

steps.action: Let dry, brush off mud, lint-roll glitter.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Ski wax

steps.action: iron through brown paper to absorb. Final Dawn wash.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.

stains.name: Snow salt / road salt (white tide line on boots and pants)

steps.action: Mix 1 tbsp white vinegar + 1 cup warm water.

stains.final_step: Inspect before drying with heat — heat sets any leftover residue permanently.
